I built an Ebbinghaus-based benchmark.
It was originally meant to test AI models but can easily be used on human participants too. Super customizable yet straightforward.

The benchmark is available either as a Python notebook on Kaggle (with free AI models!), a Shiny app or the full source code on GitHub (Py/R).
If you're into LLM evaluations or Psychophysics, I'd love to connect.

The project comprises 3 phases:
1. Stimuli generation
2. Evaluation (R: vitals, Py: inspect AI)
3. Analysis - plots

I invite you to try the Shiny App (UI for phase 1; generating stimuli), or the full pipeline with free OS AI models!
